description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a red brick facade framed by gray concrete or stone trim. The building has four stories, each with symmetrically arranged rectangular windows, some of which are illuminated with a yellowish glow, suggesting interior lighting. The ground floor on one side features a prominent arched entrance with a small staircase leading up to it, while the other sides have no visible doors. The facade includes subtle details such as window sills, lintels, and some minor weathering or stains on the brickwork. The structure appears solid and robust, typical of urban residential architecture, and is likely constructed with reinforced concrete and brick. There are no balconies or decorative elements, giving the building a utilitarian and functional appearance.
description: A four-story red brick apartment building with gray trim, flat roof, and symmetrical windows. The main entrance features an arched doorway and small steps.
description_view_0: This side shows a plain brick facade with five windows and no visible entrance, some windows are lit and there are minor stains on the lower brickwork.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main arched entrance with steps, flanked by symmetrically arranged windows, and a more prominent gray trim.
description_view_2: This side features a similar window arrangement to the opposite side, with some windows illuminated and a small patch of graffiti or debris near the base.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a uniform window pattern with all windows present, no entrance, and a clean brick facade with minimal markings.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each facade, evenly spaced and aligned horizontally across all floors, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
